message: A Codex review persona file does not match the Codex agent format — the name, description, or instructions Codex needs to spawn it is missing or has the wrong type (the exact problem is named just above). A malformed persona silently vanishes from review rather than erroring, so it is caught at the merge. The schema is resolved through the surface catalog (the 'codex-agent' surface). These files are committed renders of the canonical .claude/agents sources: fix the source and regenerate (uv run --directory .engine --frozen -- python tools/codex_gen.py generate), never the render.
